commands.review_summary:
The PR precompiles static auto-reply directive RegExp patterns in `src/auto-reply/reply/directives.ts` and passes reusable patterns into the level/simple extraction helpers.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main constructs new directive RegExp objects inside the extractor helpers, and `parseInlineDirectives` chains those helpers for inbound parsing. I did not run the counting probe because this review is read-only, but the PR body includes before/after copied live output.
